charters.name: Small Charter
charters.description: A small charter is the safer version of the job. Fewer settlers, fewer moving parts, fewer chances to get buried under your own mistakes. The downside is that every problem hits harder because there is less room to absorb it.

charters.name: Medium Charter
charters.description: This is the balanced version. Big enough to feel like a real colony, small enough that you can still keep track of what is breaking and why. Most runs should probably use this.

charters.name: Large Charter
charters.description: A large charter is where ambition starts to outrun control. More people, more demands, more chances to profit, and more ways for one decision to spread trouble across the whole colony.
